work_unit: ota_workflow: OTA-H-001b cli.py bind host allowlist (refuse 0.0.0.0/::/non-loopback unless --allow-public)
situation: audit-2026-07-05-008 derived fix #2 (priority 2, severity high, kind=route-fix). Deep re-audit found interfaces/cli.py:113 resolved the HTTP API bind host entirely from config/app.json (operator-settable) with no allowlist — an operator who sets host=0.0.0.0 in config exposes the unauthenticated price-change API (OTA-H-001a added X-OTA-Token auth in case-064, but a wildcard bind still broadens the attack surface and bypasses network-level isolation). Combined with OTA-H-001c (auto_confirm HIGH bypass) the unauth+wildcard+auto_confirm chain enables unauthorized real price changes. This fix closes the bind-host vector.
action: Added _is_loopback_host() helper (ipaddress-based, treats non-IP hostnames other than localhost as unsafe) and _resolve_bind_host(args_host, api_config, allow_public) in interfaces/cli.py. The resolver forces 127.0.0.1 default, rejects {0.0.0.0, ::, ::0, ''} and any non-loopback address unless --allow-public is explicitly passed, raising SystemExit with a clear message naming the refused host and the override flag. Added --allow-public argparse flag to the `api` subparser. Wired run_cli() `api` branch to call _resolve_bind_host(args.host, api_config, args.allow_public) instead of the raw `args.host or api_config.get('host', '127.0.0.1')`. Single-file change, 1 file, route-fix → reused existing opt-ota_workflow-1783171357 worktree (stacked on top of OTA-H-001a commit 0ca59a6).
outcome_evidence: git -C opt-ota_workflow-1783171357 log --oneline shows new commit 9424759 'opt(ota_workflow:bind-allowlist): fix(ota_workflow): OTA-H-001b cli.py bind host allowlist ...' stacked directly on 0ca59a6 (OTA-H-001a). opt-worktree.sh reported '✓ 提交到 opt-ota_workflow-1783171357 方向=ota_workflow:bind-allowlist' and '→ 复用同 area worktree (route-fix): opt-ota_workflow-1783171357'. python3 ast.parse on cli.py → 'OK syntax'. Main working tree restored to pre-edit baseline by opt-worktree cp/restore dance (expected; fix lives on branch). origin push skipped (credential prompt for ghp-ro.alibaba-inc.com not available in this env — same as prior OTA fixes; local branch 9424759 on disk is what cycle-state tracks).
next_suggestion: 下轮派生 OTA-H-001c (orchestrator.py auto_confirm guard: execute_text/execute_structured 开头 if auto_confirm and risk.level==HIGH raise ValueError; merges OTA-M-006 same fix). 同 area route-fix, 复用 opt-ota_workflow-1783171357 stack. 之后 OTA-M-001 (hermes_discord_bot.py:664 token config fallback) → 仍 pending_count 9. 全部 12 derived merged|rejected 后 audit-cycle-state.status→cycle-complete 触发下一轮全量审计.
